generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who's lived through multiple crises, I can tell you: strategic autonomy isn't just about being tough on defense. It's about protecting our way of life. The current approach leaves us vulnerable to supply chain disruptions that could cripple our economy. We've seen it happen before - remember the semiconductor shortages? That's what happens when we don't control our own destiny. The experts agree: diversifying our supply chains is the only way to ensure long-term security. #NationalSecurity #EconomicResilience
